name: RAK Petroleum plc
summary: RAK Petroleum plc operates as an oil and gas investment company. As of December 31, 2020, the company primarily holds 44.94% interests in DNO ASA through which it owns 98 licenses comprises 2 licenses in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq, 76 licenses in Norway, 16 licenses in the United Kingdom, two licenses in the Netherlands, one license in Ireland, and one license in Yemen. It also holds 33.33% interest in Foxtrot International LDC, which operates offshore Block CI-27 comprising four producing gas fields with associated oil and condensates in Foxtrot and Mahi; and Block CI-12 offshore exploration licenses. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Weybridge, the United Kingdom.
